vpclattice.service.CfnAbout:
Creates a service. A service is any software application that can run on instances containers, or serverless functions within an account or virtual private cloud (VPC).

For more information, see [Services](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/vpc-lattice/latest/ug/services.html) in the *Amazon VPC Lattice User Guide*.

vpclattice.service.AuthType.Description: The type of IAM policy.  + `NONE`: The resource does not use an IAM policy. This is the default.+ `AWS_IAM`: The resource uses an IAM policy. When this type is used, auth is enabled and an auth policy is required.

vpclattice.service.CertificateArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the certificate.

vpclattice.service.CustomDomainName.Description: The custom domain name of the service.

vpclattice.service.DnsEntry.Description: The DNS information of the service.

vpclattice.service.Name.Description: The name of the service. The name must be unique within the account. The valid characters are a-z, 0-9, and hyphens (-). You can't use a hyphen as the first or last character, or immediately after another hyphen.  If you don't specify a name, CloudFormation generates one. However, if you specify a name, and later want to replace the resource, you must specify a new name.
